title: Crunchy Argentinian Beef Empanadas
description: A kid-friendly Argentinian dish featuring crispy, air-fried empanadas filled with seasoned beef and red onions, perfect for a snack or light meal. The combination of crunchy exterior and savory filling makes for a delightful treat.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine flour and salt. Gradually add water, mixing until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until smooth, then cover and let rest for 30 minutes.
In a separate bowl, mix ground beef, chopped red onion, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Divide the rested dough into 8-10 equal pieces. Roll each into a thin circle.
Place a tablespoon of the beef mixture onto the center of each dough circle. If using cheese, sprinkle on top of the beef.
Fold the dough over the filling, forming a half-moon shape, and press the edges together to seal.
Brush the tops of the empanadas with olive oil and beaten egg for a golden glaze.
Preheat an air fryer to 375°F (190°C). Cook the empanadas in batches if necessary, for 5-7 minutes or until crispy and golden.
